finite_gate: all dequantized weights, projection outputs, expert outputs, MoE outputs, logits, and selected tokens must be finite
semantic_gates: frozen F32 router IDs remain exact_match_safe
Tier B top-k vocabulary IDs agree
budget_scope: representative M4.3-02 cases only; characterize on full Tier A/B before promotion
stop_condition: first structural mismatch, non-finite value, budget exceedance, unsafe router/token margin, or changed F32 evidence
contract_decision: do not alter m4.2-tolerance-contract-registry-v1.json or m4.3-01 F32 baseline
